titleStmt.title: SII 5.631: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 631. (A.R. No. 73 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 2 vatuVadu is expressed both by symbol and word.miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu trayodaśi yum tiṅkaṭ
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ svasti śrīmaṉu mahāprathā
ni kumārakaṇṭarakova comayateṇṭanāyakkar Aṭai
ppattu cokkaṇṇaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭai
yanāyaṉārkku tirumañcaṉam Āṭiaruḷa śrīkāveriyilniṉṟum nāḷ
Oṉṟukku Oru kuṭam tirumañcaṉam Eṭuppārkku jivaṉattukkum
Iṟuppukkum Uṭalāka koṇṭu viṭṭa Innāyaṉār teva
tāṉam karuṇākaranallūrp piṟinta kulottuṅkacoḻamaṅ
kalattu kaṇṭarātittavatikku kiḻakku kontakkamātelivāyk
kālukku vaṭakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu tirupputtūrāṉe
ṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilam �l teṟkaṭaiya koṇṭu viṭṭa
nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi Itil tevarkaṭamai palakaṭamai Uḷḷi
ṭṭa Iṟuppukku veṇṭum nilam kāṇi nikki Iṟai mikutikku Uṭa
lāṉa nilamāy tirumañcaṉam Eṭukkum Āṇṭārkku jivaṉattukku viṭṭa
nila maraikkāṇi Āka nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi Innilam kāṇi A
raikkāṇiyum Ippaṭiyāl kalveṭṭik kuṭutteṉ coma
ya teṇṭanāyakkar Aṭaippattu cokkaṇaṉeṉ Itu paṉmā
heśarar ra kṣai ḥ
Digital edition of SII 5.631 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
